how.title: How It Works — Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life
how.description: Matching, guidance, four steps, a three-tier model — everything you need to know about the path to joining Bishvileinu.
how.hero_lead: From the first meeting to a lasting partnership — a step-by-step guide.
how.svc1_text: We match each community with a memorial initiative close to its heart, and connect it to the bereaved family behind it.
how.svc2_text: We accompany the community from the first meeting to a lasting partnership — tailoring the process to its needs.
how.svc3_text: We subsidize the community's visit to the initiative, and work to raise resources to expand the activity to many communities.
how.svc4_text: We adapt for each community the Zionist and educational values learned from the soldier's story, and connect students to meaningful action.
how.step1_text: The community chooses, among the memorial initiatives, a project close to its heart.
how.step2_text: They get to know the person, their story and their values of heroism and resilience.
how.step3_text: They become active partners in remembrance — in the local community or in Israel.
how.step4_text: An educational, economic and entrepreneurial partnership — and the path is only beginning.
how.outcome1: Widening the circle of remembrance of our nation's heroes
how.outcome2: Strengthening Jewish resilience and identity amid the challenges of our time
how.outcome3: Creating a real path for social action in Israel
how.outcome4: Educating toward initiative, taking responsibility and active Jewish involvement
how.outcome5: Creating new paths between Israelis and their brethren in the diaspora
how.story_lead: Here's what a real partnership looks like in practice.
how.jcard1_alt: Bereaved parents telling students about their fallen son
how.jcard1_title: In the classroom, across the sea
how.jcard1_text: Bereaved parents tell students in the community about their son — his life, his values and his heroism. An encounter that connects heart to heart, across the ocean.
how.jcard2_alt: Students from abroad taking part in the activity of a memorial initiative in Israel
how.jcard2_text: The partners from the diaspora come to Israel, take part in the initiative's activity and expand it together with the family — from the page to the path.
how.tiers_lead: The Bishvileinu nonprofit works to raise additional resources to expand the initiative and subsidize the delegations coming to Israel.
how.tier1_text: Financial support for all stages of local implementation: carrying out a local memorial project, organizing representation from the bereaved family, and spreading the fallen soldier's story.
how.tier2_text: In addition — involvement in the memorial project in Israel, financial partnership and involvement in its growth and dissemination.
how.tier3_text: In addition — delegations to Israel (subsidized by the nonprofit), significant promotion of the initiative and its replication in further places.
how.cta_text: Every journey starts with a choice. Choose your path.
